    G

    generatedEventId - Variable in class com.example.codebase.CreateEventViewModel
    Firestore document ID assigned to the newly created event.
    generatedQr - Variable in class com.example.codebase.CreateEventViewModel
    QR code
    invalid reference 
    Bitmap
    generated after a successful event creation, encoding the deep-link URI timely://event/<eventId>.
    geoRequired - Variable in class com.example.codebase.CreateEventViewModel
    Whether attendees must be within a required geographic area to check in.
    getCachedEvents() - Method in class com.example.codebase.AppCache
    Returns the currently cached list of events.
    getCachedUser() - Method in class com.example.codebase.AppCache
    Returns the currently cached user.
    getCancelledEntrants() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the list of device IDs for entrants who declined or were cancelled.
    getDescription() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the event description.
    getDeviceId() - Method in class com.example.codebase.User
    Gets the unique device identifier for this user.
    getDrawDate() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the date and time of the lottery draw.
    getEmail() - Method in class com.example.codebase.User
    Gets the email for the user.
    getEndDate() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the event end date and time.
    getEnrolledEntrants() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the list of device IDs for entrants who accepted their invitation.
    getEventId() - Method in class com.example.codebase.AppNotification
    Returns the Firestore document ID of the related event.
    getEventId() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the secondary event ID field.
    getEventTitle() - Method in class com.example.codebase.AppNotification
    Returns the display title of the related event.
    getId() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the primary Firestore document ID.
    getInstance() - Static method in class com.example.codebase.AppCache
    Returns the singleton instance of AppCache.
    getInstance() - Static method in class com.example.codebase.AppDatabase
    Returns the singleton instance of AppDatabase.
    getItemCount() - Method in class com.example.codebase.CancelledEntrantsAdapter
    Returns the total number of items in the list.
    getItemCount() - Method in class com.example.codebase.EventAdapter
    Returns the total number of events in the data set.
    getItemCount() - Method in class com.example.codebase.ExploreEventAdapter
    Returns the total number of invitation rows in the list.
    getItemCount() - Method in class com.example.codebase.InvitedEntrantsAdapter
    Returns the number of entrants in the current list.
    getItemCount() - Method in class com.example.codebase.OrganizerEventAdapter
    Returns the total number of events in the data set.
    getItemCount() - Method in class com.example.codebase.WizardPagerAdapter
    Returns the total number of pages in the wizard.
    getLocation() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the event location.
    getMaxCapacity() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the maximum enrolment capacity for this event.
    getMessage() - Method in class com.example.codebase.AppNotification
    Returns the body text of the notification.
    getName() - Method in class com.example.codebase.User
    Gets the name for the user.
    getNotificationId() - Method in class com.example.codebase.AppNotification
    Returns the unique notification document ID.
    getOrCreateDeviceId(Context) - Static method in class com.example.codebase.DeviceIdManager
    Retrieves the stored device ID or generates a new one if none exists.
    getOrganizerDeviceId() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the device ID of the organizer who created this event.
    getPhoneNumber() - Method in class com.example.codebase.User
    Gets the optional phone number for the user.
    getPoster() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the event poster object containing the Base64-encoded image.
    getPosterImageBase64() - Method in class com.example.codebase.EventPoster
    Returns the Base64-encoded string representation of the poster image.
    getPosterUrl() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the URL of the remotely hosted poster image.
    getPrice() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the participation fee for the event.
    getRegistrationDeadline() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the registration deadline after which no new entrants may join.
    getRegistrationOpen() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the date from which entrants may join the waiting list.
    getRole() - Method in class com.example.codebase.User
    Gets the current role of the user.
    getSelectedEntrants() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the list of device IDs for lottery-selected entrants awaiting response.
    getSessionRole(android.content.Context) - Static method in class com.example.codebase.WelcomeActivity
    Returns the role that was saved for the current session.
    getShortenedId(String) - Static method in class com.example.codebase.DeviceIdManager
    Shortens a device ID to its first 8 characters for UI display.
    getStartDate() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the event start date and time.
    getStatus() - Method in class com.example.codebase.AppNotification
    Returns the lottery outcome status for this notification.
    getStatus() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the raw Firestore status string for this event.
    getTitle() - Method in class com.example.codebase.AppNotification
    Returns the subject line of the notification.
    getTitle() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the event title.
    getType() - Method in class com.example.codebase.AppNotification
    Returns the recipient group type this notification was sent to.
    getUserId() - Method in class com.example.codebase.AppNotification
    Returns the device ID of the entrant this notification was sent to.
    getView(int, View, ViewGroup) - Method in class com.example.codebase.FinalEntrantListAdapter
    Returns a view for the entrant at the given position, inflating final_entrant_list_item if no recycled view is available.
    getWaitingList() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the list of device IDs for entrants on the waiting list.
    getWaitlistCap() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the maximum number of entrants permitted on the waiting list.
    getWinnersCount() - Method in class com.example.codebase.Event
    Returns the number of entrants to select during the lottery draw.
